top_signals.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
top_signals.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Tech Download: How chip companies are looking to use light to solve this major AI bottleneck
top_signals.summary: Nvidia is investing billions into companies developing photonics, which industry watchers say could bring big efficiency gains to the AI sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Man sent to prison for selling data of 7 millions elderly Americans
top_signals.summary: A North Carolina man was sentenced to more than 10 years in prison for selling the personal information of over 7 million elderly Americans to Jamaican scammers. [...]

top_signals.title: Can Newcastle go posh? Our honest review of city’s first five-star hotel
top_signals.summary: In a far cry from the late noughties zeitgeist of Geordie Shore, Hotel Gotham offers a fresh brand of sexy that differentiates Newcastle from its MTV days. Once famous as the hangout for characters from that reality show, like Scotty T and Gary ‘the parsnip’ Beadle, Newcastle has quietly been building a higher-end repertoire of [...]

top_signals.title: DEME to Install Japan’s First 15MW Offshore Wind Turbines
top_signals.summary: DEME, through its Japanese joint venture Japan Offshore Marine (JOM), has secured a contract for the Oga–Katagami–Akita Offshore Wind Project, covering engineering work and vessel charter services for the offshore installation of 21 wind turbines.The…
